cancel(address[],uint256[],bytes[],bytes.details: VULN-7: Any proposer can cancel their proposal at any time —      even during the active voting period — enabling griefing.

castVote(uint256,uint8).details: VULN-1: Vote weight is token.getVotes(msg.sender) at the time of              the call, NOT getPastVotes at the proposal snapshot block.              This is exploitable via flash loans.      VULN-2: The hasVoted guard is deliberately NOT enforced.  Any address              can call castVote multiple times on the same proposal.

execute(address[],uint256[],bytes[],byte.details: VULN-3: No timelock — execution is immediate once voting ends.      VULN-6: The `executed` flag is set AFTER external calls, violating              the Checks-Effects-Interactions (CEI) pattern.  A malicious              target contract can re-enter this function before the state              is updated and execute the proposal multiple times.      VULN-8: calldatas / targets / values are passed in by the caller and              are not validated against stored values before execution.

propose(address[],uint256[],bytes[],stri.details: VULN-4: No proposal threshold check — any address may call this,      including addresses with zero token balance.

state(uint256).details: Implements the full Pending → Active → Succeeded/Defeated → Executed / Canceled      lifecycle.

TOKEN().notice: The voting token.  Vote weight is queried live (VULN-1).

castVote(uint256,uint8).notice: Cast a vote on a proposal.

castVoteWithReason(uint256,uint8,string).notice: Cast a vote with an optional reason string.

hashProposal(address[],uint256[],bytes[].notice: Derives the deterministic proposal ID from its contents.

proposalProposer(uint256).notice: Returns the proposer of a given proposal.

proposalSnapshot(uint256).notice: Returns the start and end block of a proposal's voting window.

proposalThreshold().notice: VULN-4: proposalThreshold is 0 — anyone can propose.

proposalVotes(uint256).notice: Returns the raw vote tallies for a proposal.

quorumVotes().notice: VULN-5: quorumVotes is 0 — any positive majority suffices.

state(uint256).notice: Returns the current state of a proposal.

votingDelay().notice: Delay in blocks between proposal creation and voting start.

votingPeriod().notice: Duration in blocks of the voting window.
